_comment: Retrospective validation harness (gate 6). Each entry pins the acceptable grade range for a known-outcome case; a re-scoring that leaves the range breaks the build. CORPUS COMPOSITION RULE (methodology lead, 2026-07-06): per data-rich country, ~6-10 cases = the media 'stars' (extremes, they anchor the A/E bounds) PLUS a 'portfolio floor' of 2-3 average, no-buzz DCs with mundane outcomes (they anchor the center) PLUS pillar stratification (water-stressed/not, dense/rural). An outlier-only corpus makes the grid learn the tail and mis-grade the center. A case enters only if sourceable. Phase 5 replaces the fictional zz cases accordingly.
